meta.title: SAKURA SPA Nipponbashi | Osaka Men's Relaxation Spa
meta.description: Private mobile men's relaxation spa in Osaka Nipponbashi. By appointment only. Our experienced therapists come to your hotel or home.

ageGate.title: Age Verification
ageGate.description:
This website is intended for adults aged 18 and over.
Visitors under 18 are not permitted to enter.

hero.title: SAKURA SPA
hero.subtitle: Nipponbashi
hero.catch:
Escape the ordinary.
Indulge in pure bliss.
hero.desc: By appointment only. Our skilled therapists come to your hotel or home, offering a completely private and luxurious relaxation experience.

items.name: Luxury Lymphatic Massage
items.desc: An authentic lymphatic treatment with a generous use of oil — melting away fatigue and tension from head to toe.

items.name: Mobile Service
items.desc: Our experienced therapists come directly to your hotel or home, so you can relax without leaving your room.

items.name: By Appointment Only
items.desc: Completely private, reservation-only service. Book easily via LINE.
